description: Node TS library + C++ Node-API addon (two sibling packages)

notes: Generates projects/libs/<name> (Node TS) and projects/libs/<name>-native (C++ Node-API addon).
The Node package loads native/<addon_name>.node via createRequire(import.meta.url).
TARGETS use nix_cpp_node_addon for the addon and nix_node_gen for copying the .node artifact.
One test per file. Set --no-tests to skip Node test file generation.
